title: 阪神JFの後に・可能性、抱いて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fantastic demonstration of power and
speed on a G1 stage, Mejiro Dober feels more
confident about taking on the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Oka Sho, the first race of the
Triple Tiara. Mejiro Dober's classic-year battle is
about to begin!
